layout.tagline: Ban do, audio va tro ly du lich

map.title: Ban do kham pha Vinh Khanh
map.subtitle: Theo doi vi tri cua ban, xem cac diem an uong gan day va chon nhanh diem muon ghe.
map.jumpToVinhKhanh: Den pho am thuc Vinh Khanh
map.usingDefaultCenter: Dang dung tam mac dinh cua pho am thuc
map.requestingLocation: Dang xin quyen va lay vi tri hien tai...
map.userLocationLabel: Vi tri hien tai cua ban
map.demoLocationLabel: Vi tri demo tai pho am thuc Vinh Khanh
map.demoHint: Dang dung vi tri demo de ban xem nhanh cac quan o pho am thuc Vinh Khanh.
map.nearestPoi: Diem gan nhat luc nay la {{name}}, cach ban khoang {{distance}}.
map.loadError: Khong tai duoc du lieu POI.
map.emptyNearby: Chua tim thay diem nao trong ban kinh hien tai.
map.noDescription: Chua co mo ta cho dia diem nay.
map.selectHint: Chon mot diem tren ban do hoac trong danh sach de xem nhanh.
map.tapPoiHint: Bat GPS de xem khoang cach thuc te.

settings.title: Cai dat trai nghiem
settings.subtitle: Tinh chinh ngon ngu va hanh vi audio truoc khi mo rong sang chatbot va huong dan tu dong.
settings.mapProviderDescription: Ung dung dang dung OpenStreetMap qua Leaflet de de test, khong can API key va van rat hop cho phat trien tinh nang GPS, marker va nearby.
settings.autoPlayDescription: Khi bat, app co the tu dong phat audio khi ban tien den gan diem tham quan trong cac buoc tiep theo.

audio.title: Audio guide
audio.ttsReady: Dang dung trinh doc giong noi tren trinh duyet de mo ta quan an theo ngon ngu ban chon.
audio.unavailable: POI nay chua co file audio. Khi backend bo sung audio URL, player nay se dung duoc ngay.
audio.noPoiSelected: Chon mot diem de xem audio guide.

chat.title: Tro ly am thuc AI
chat.subtitle: Hoi nhanh ve cac quan demo o Vinh Khanh
chat.welcome: Xin chao. Ban co the hoi minh nen an gi, quan nao dang co tren ban do, hoac ten mot quan cu the de nghe giai thich ngan.
chat.placeholder: Hoi ve mon an, quan an, ban do...
